data.title: Cloud Integration
data.description: Utilizes Azure cloud services for hosting and global content distribution.
data.technical_spec: Azure Content Delivery Network, VM instances, Load Balancers

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Employs microservices to allow independent scaling and deployment of services.

data.title: API Gateway
data.description: Manages traffic and acts as a facade for microservices with added security.

data.title: Responsive Web Design
data.description: Ensures compatibility and usability across all device types and screen sizes.
data.technical_spec: CSS Flexbox, CSS Grid, Media Queries

data.title: Server-Side Rendering
data.description: Renders pages on the server to improve load times and SEO.
